Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Inspection Demand; Exhibits
Off Calendar Sep-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
John G. Warner for Cross-defendant and moving party: Yuko Nishitani-Lee and JOspeh Lee
TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE:
Donna L. LaPorte for defendant and opposing party: Creative Capital Leasing Group

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Joseph Lee and Yuko Nishitani-Lee's motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents.
The motion is ordered off calendar for failure to comply with California Rule of Court 335. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to the supplemental responses. The Court notes that many of the requests, as drafted, are overbroad. At the same time, defendant has asserted general objections that are not authorized by the Code of Civil Procedure. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
